intent: Pin the fail-closed contract for the priority freshness gate. When the priority artifact is missing/stale/malformed/non-registry-aligned, Top 3, Top 10, and All views MUST hide ranking and surface the exact recompute command.

cases.expected_outcome: freshness_gate.status='stale', ok=false, recompute_command surfaced, no Top 3 rendered.
cases.actual_outcome: evaluatePriorityFreshnessGate returns status=stale, ok=false; recompute_command starts with build_tls_dependency_priority.py; verified by priorityFreshnessGate.test.ts:'blocks when timestamp is stale'.
verified by priorityFreshnessGate.test.ts:'blocks when generated_at is malformed'

cases.description: Priority artifact file does not exist.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by priorityFreshnessGate.test.ts:'blocks when priority artifact missing'
verified by priorityFreshnessGate.test.ts:'blocks when JSON is invalid'

cases.description: Priority artifact lists H01 in top_5 (forbidden / not in active universe).
cases.actual_outcome: verified by priorityFreshnessGate.test.ts:'blocks when top_5 references a non-active system_id'
verified by priorityFreshnessGate.test.ts:'blocks when registry contract is missing'

fixes_applied.rationale: Adds registry-universe alignment on top of existing JSON / schema / timestamp / freshness checks; produces a single yes/no for showing ranking surfaces.
Returns the gate alongside the loader payload so the dashboard surface can show the fail-closed banner with the exact recompute command without re-implementing the gate.
Builds a governed artifact that records JSON/schema/freshness/registry-universe outcomes for review and red-team comparison.
